assertion_results.text: The agent detects Express as the framework and selects @arcjet/node
A shared Arcjet client is created with shield() as the base rule
assertion_results.evidence: lib/arcjet.ts exports shared client with shield({ mode: LIVE }).

assertion_results.text: Route-specific rules are applied using withRule(), not by modifying the shared instance
protect() is called inside the route handler, not as middleware
assertion_results.evidence: protect() called inside app.get handler, not via app.use().

assertion_results.text: Denied decisions return appropriate HTTP status codes (429 for rate limit, 403 for bot)
ARCJET_KEY is read from an environment variable, not hardcoded
